abilities.shortEffect: Has a 33% chance of curing any major status ailment after each turn.
abilities.effect: After each turn, this Pokémon has a 33% of being cured of any major status ailment.

abilities.shortEffect: Decreases all direct damage taken by friendly Pokémon to 0.75×.
abilities.effect:
All friendly Pokémon take 0.75× as much direct damage from moves while this Pokémon is in battle.

This effect stacks if multiple allied Pokémon have it.
